title: Living Charter Principle
body:
SherpaCarta is a living document. Technology evolves faster than legal frameworks. Therefore, this charter shall be reviewed annually by a global council of signatories, legal experts, technologists, civil society representatives, and affected communities.

Amendments may be proposed by any signatory, debated publicly for 90 days, and ratified by two-thirds supermajority of active signatory organizations. No amendment may reduce the protections of any existing article. Rights may only expand, never contract.
